2603.19531.title: dinov3.seg: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation with DINOv3
2603.19531.paper_summary: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation (OVSS) assigns pixel-level labels from an open set of text-defined categories, demanding reliable generalization to unseen classes at inference. Although modern vision-language models (VLMs) support strong open-vocabulary recognition, their representations learned through global contrastive objectives remain suboptimal for dense prediction, prompting many OVSS methods to depend on limited adaptation or refinement of image-text similarity maps. This, in turn, restricts spatial precision and robustness in complex, cluttered scenes. We introduce dinov3.seg, extending dinov3.txt into a dedicated framework for OVSS. Our contributions are four-fold. First, we design a task-specific architecture tailored to this backbone, systematically adapting established design principles from prior open-vocabulary segmentation work. Second, we jointly leverage text embeddings aligned with both the global [CLS] token and local patch-level visual features from ViT-based encoder, effectively combining semantic discrimination with fine-grained spatial locality. Third, unlike prior approaches that rely primarily on post hoc similarity refinement, we perform early refinement of visual representations prior to image-text interaction, followed by late refinement of the resulting image-text correlation features, enabling more accurate and robust dense predictions in cluttered scenes. Finally, we propose a high-resolution local-global inference strategy based on sliding-window aggregation, which preserves spatial detail while maintaining global context. We conduct extensive experiments on five widely adopted OVSS benchmarks to evaluate our approach. The results demonstrate its effectiveness and robustness, consistently outperforming current state-of-the-art methods.
2603.19531.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙語義分割（OVSS）從一組開放的文本定義類別中為每個像素分配標籤，要求在推斷時對未見類別進行可靠的泛化。儘管現代視覺-語言模型（VLMs）支持強大的開放詞彙識別，但它們通過全局對比目標學習的表示在密集預測中仍然不理想，這促使許多OVSS方法依賴於有限的適應或圖像-文本相似性圖的精煉。這反過來又限制了在複雜、雜亂場景中的空間精度和穩健性。我們介紹了dinov3.seg，將dinov3.txt擴展為一個專門的OVSS框架。我們的貢獻有四個方面。首先，我們設計了一個針對這個骨幹的任務特定架構，系統性地調整了先前開放詞彙分割工作的既定設計原則。其次，我們共同利用與全局[CLS]標記和來自ViT基編碼器的局部補丁級視覺特徵對齊的文本嵌入，有效地將語義區分與細粒度的空間局部性結合起來。第三，與主要依賴事後相似性精煉的先前方法不同，我們在圖像-文本交互之前對視覺表示進行早期精煉，然後對生成的圖像-文本相關特徵進行後期精煉，從而在雜亂場景中實現更準確和穩健的密集預測。最後，我們提出了一種基於滑動窗口聚合的高解析度局部-全局推斷策略，該策略在保持全局上下文的同時保留空間細節。我們在五個廣泛採用的OVSS基準上進行了廣泛的實驗以評估我們的方法。結果證明了其有效性和穩健性，始終超越當前的最先進方法。
2603.19531.author: Saikat Dutta et.al.
2603.19531.authors: Saikat Dutta, Biplab Banerjee, Hamid Rezatofighi
